# app-publish-mcp

> MCP server for App Store Connect & Google Play Console — manage app listings, screenshots, releases, reviews & submissions from AI assistants

## Install

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "app-publish-mcp": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "app-publish-mcp"],
      "env": {
        "APPLE_KEY_ID": "YOUR_KEY_ID",
        "APPLE_ISSUER_ID": "YOUR_ISSUER_ID",
        "APPLE_P8_PATH": "/path/to/AuthKey.p8",
        "GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PATH": "/path/to/service-account.json"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Tools (91 total)

### Apple App Store Connect (56)
- apple_list_apps — List all apps in App Store Connect
- apple_get_app — Get app details by ID
- apple_get_app_info — Get app info (categories, age rating)
- apple_update_category — Update app categories
- apple_list_bundle_ids — List registered bundle IDs
- apple_create_bundle_id — Register a new bundle ID
- apple_list_bundle_id_capabilities — List capabilities for a bundle ID
- apple_enable_capability — Enable a capability for a bundle ID
- apple_disable_capability — Disable a capability for a bundle ID
- apple_list_versions — List app versions
- apple_create_version — Create a new app version
- apple_list_version_localizations — List version localizations
- apple_create_version_localization — Create a version localization
- apple_update_version_localization — Update version localization (whatsNew, description, keywords)
- apple_list_app_info_localizations — List app info localizations
- apple_update_app_info_localization — Update app info localization
- apple_list_screenshot_sets — List screenshot sets for a localization
- apple_create_screenshot_set — Create a screenshot set for a display type
- apple_upload_screenshot — Upload a screenshot image
- apple_delete_screenshot — Delete a screenshot
- apple_list_builds — List uploaded builds
- apple_assign_build — Assign a build to a version
- apple_get_age_rating — Get age rating declaration
- apple_update_age_rating — Update age rating declaration
- apple_update_review_detail — Update App Review contact info and notes
- apple_submit_for_review — Submit a version for App Review
- apple_cancel_submission — Cancel a pending submission
- apple_get_pricing — Get current pricing info
- apple_set_price — Set app price tier
- apple_list_availability — List territory availability
- apple_list_reviews — List customer reviews
- apple_respond_to_review — Respond to a customer review
- apple_list_certificates — List signing certificates
- apple_create_certificate — Create a signing certificate
- apple_revoke_certificate — Revoke a signing certificate
- apple_list_profiles — List provisioning profiles
- apple_create_profile — Create a provisioning profile
- apple_delete_profile — Delete a provisioning profile
- apple_list_devices — List registered devices
- apple_register_device — Register a new device
- apple_update_device — Update device info
- apple_list_beta_groups — List TestFlight beta groups
- apple_create_beta_group — Create a TestFlight beta group
- apple_delete_beta_group — Delete a TestFlight beta group
- apple_add_beta_testers_to_group — Add testers to a beta group
- apple_remove_beta_testers_from_group — Remove testers from a beta group
- apple_list_beta_testers — List TestFlight beta testers
- apple_invite_beta_tester — Invite a beta tester
- apple_delete_beta_tester — Delete a beta tester
- apple_list_iap — List in-app purchases
- apple_create_iap — Create an in-app purchase
- apple_get_iap — Get in-app purchase details
- apple_delete_iap — Delete an in-app purchase
- apple_list_subscription_groups — List subscription groups
- apple_create_subscription_group — Create a subscription group
- apple_delete_subscription_group — Delete a subscription group

### Google Play Console (35)
- google_create_edit — Start a new edit session
- google_commit_edit — Commit (publish) an edit
- google_validate_edit — Validate an edit before committing
- google_delete_edit — Discard an edit
- google_get_details — Get app details
- google_update_details — Update app details (contact info, etc.)
- google_list_listings — List store listings (all locales)
- google_get_listing — Get a store listing for a locale
- google_update_listing — Update a store listing
- google_delete_listing — Delete a store listing
- google_get_country_availability — Get country availability for a track
- google_get_testers — Get testers for a track
- google_update_testers — Update testers for a track
- google_list_images — List images for a listing
- google_upload_image — Upload an image (screenshots, icon, feature graphic)
- google_delete_image — Delete an image
- google_delete_all_images — Delete all images of a type
- google_list_tracks — List all release tracks
- google_get_track — Get track details (releases, status)
- google_create_release — Create a release on a track
- google_promote_release — Promote a release to another track
- google_halt_release — Halt a staged rollout
- google_upload_bundle — Upload an AAB bundle
- google_upload_apk — Upload an APK
- google_list_reviews — List user reviews
- google_get_review — Get a specific review
- google_reply_to_review — Reply to a user review
- google_list_iap — List in-app products
- google_get_iap — Get in-app product details
- google_create_iap — Create an in-app product
- google_update_iap — Update an in-app product
- google_delete_iap — Delete an in-app product
- google_list_subscriptions — List subscriptions
- google_get_subscription — Get subscription details
- google_archive_subscription — Archive a subscription

### Prompts (2)
- app_release_checklist — Guided checklist for releasing an app update
- app_store_optimization — ASO audit with actionable recommendations

### Resources (2)
- app-publish://config — Current server configuration
- app-publish://supported-platforms — All supported tools grouped by platform

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Required | Description |
|----------|----------|-------------|
| `APPLE_KEY_ID` | For iOS | App Store Connect API Key ID |
| `APPLE_ISSUER_ID` | For iOS | App Store Connect Issuer ID |
| `APPLE_P8_PATH` | For iOS | Path to AuthKey .p8 file |
| `GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PATH` | For Android | Path to Google service account JSON |
